title: Broker selection wiring
acceptance_criteria: Selection logic: if SIMULATE=true → return new MarketDataSimulator({ clock }); else if BROKER='angelone' → return new AngelOneBrokerFeed({ ... from env }); else default → return new FyersBrokerFeed({ ... from env })

Exports createBrokerWithFallback(clock: Clock): BrokerFeed — wraps the primary broker (Fyers by default) with fallback logic: on AUTH_FAILURE from primary, if BROKER_FALLBACK='angelone' is set → log WARN 'Primary broker auth failed, switching to Angel One fallback' → return AngelOneBrokerFeed; if BROKER_FALLBACK not set → re-throw the auth error
Validates required env vars at startup and throws a descriptive error if missing (e.g., 'FYERS_ACCESS_TOKEN is required when SIMULATE is not true')
FYERS_ACCESS_TOKEN, ANGEL_API_KEY etc are read from process.env inside the factory — never hardcoded, never default-valued to anything real
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
